mission: Reduce the remaining support-side interaction theorem W_N to its minimal admissible operator class and quantify the exact activation required by the Paper 35 target.

theorem_1_minimal_number_changing_even_c.statement: On the neutral even-CAR sector, every gauge-neutral self-adjoint quadratic generator has the form H = a^dagger h a + (1/2)(a^dagger Delta a^dagger + a Delta^* a). The number operator N commutes with the number-preserving block a^dagger h a and fails to commute exactly with the anomalous pairing block. Therefore the minimal gauge-neutral even-CAR number-changing support interaction class is Bogoliubov pairing.

formulae.quadratic_generator: H_quad = a^dagger h a + (1/2)(a^dagger Delta a^dagger + a Delta^* a)
formulae.number_commutator: [N, H_quad] = a^dagger Delta a^dagger - a Delta^* a
formulae.minimal_W_N: W_N^min = (1/2)(a^dagger Delta a^dagger + a Delta^* a)

theorem_2_exact_activation_target.statement: At the previously fixed source crossing radius, the required visible precursor fixes the exact number of source quanta that must be active if one allows at most O(1) visible B-L per active quantum.

theorem_3_pairing_route_is_not_algebraic.statement: The required source count is far above the free centered-rms seed count but far below the total available J=1/2 puncture count. Therefore the support-side pairing route is not killed by occupancy bounds or finite-state counting. It remains live as a genuinely new collective production theorem.

final_boundary.safe_statement: The remaining support-side Paper 35 frontier is no longer an arbitrary interaction W_N. It reduces to a genuinely new Bogoliubov/pairing collective-production theorem on the neutral even-CAR sector, with exact activation target N_required and exact required fraction of the full puncture population.
remaining_objects: a theorem deriving the pairing kernel Delta on the support branch
a theorem selecting the active production history generated by Delta
